name: The Basin
visibility: Variable — clear in mornings, mist along shorelines by dusk

special.name: Lake Fog
special.desc: Dense fog rolls across the Basin at dawn and dusk. Visibility drops to 30 feet for {{1d4}} hours. Creatures relying on sight have disadvantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks.

special.name: Reflected Dreams
special.desc: When moonlight strikes still Basin waters, reflections sometimes move of their own accord. A creature that stares for more than a minute must succeed on a DC 12 Wisdom saving throw or experience vivid dreams that night, granting either inspiration or one portent-like vision at DM discretion.

special.name: Stillwater Echo
special.desc: During calm weather, voices carry across the Basin unnaturally far. Any shouted word can be heard up to 600 feet away if the listener is near open water.

wind.10: Still air — smoke drifts upward in thin spirals.
wind.15: Gentle breeze — rustling reeds and lapping waves.
wind.19: Brisk wind — choppy waters, loose shutters creak.
wind.20: Strong wind — stormfront forming, waves white-capped.

precipitation.6: Clear skies; scattered clouds and bright sunlight.
precipitation.10: Overcast or light fog drifting over the lake.
precipitation.14: Light rain or drizzle; rippling puddles and damp air.
precipitation.17: Steady rain or sleet; distant thunder murmurs.
precipitation.19: Heavy rain or hailstorm; flooding along riverbanks.
precipitation.20: Snowfall or frost — early or late seasonal flurry.

foraging.60: {{1d4}} bushels of wild grain or edible roots
foraging.100: 1 guardian spirit of the Basin, born from Vaeloras dream
